description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a long neck and a narrow mouth, capped with a metallic or plastic cap. The bottle features a prominent circular label on the front, displaying a red and white logo with the text 'DOUBLE TEAM ROOT BEER' in bold, stylized font. The neck of the bottle is wrapped with a matching label, also showing the brand's logo and text. The bottle appears to be filled with a light brown liquid, visible through the translucent glass. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, with no visible signs of damage or wear. The overall design is typical of commercial beverage bottles, intended for single-serving use.
description: A brown glass bottle with a long neck, metallic cap, and prominent red and white 'DOUBLE TEAM ROOT BEER' branding. The bottle is filled with a light brown liquid and features smooth, glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing part of the circular label and the neck label, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full circular 'DOUBLE TEAM ROOT BEER' label and the neck label, both clearly visible and centered.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite side of the bottle with partial label visibility and the neck label.
description_view_3: Another frontal view, similar to view 1, with the main label and neck label both clearly visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Circular red and white label with 'DOUBLE TEAM ROOT BEER' text and logo on the front and neck of the bottle.
